chosen_reductions: force pair multiplicity 10 on a perfect matching and 9 elsewhere
fix one of 10395 equivalent perfect matchings
split into two exhaustive canonical root cases r0-present and no-r0-r1-present
use bitsets for the 495 coverage constraints
use deterministic cube ranges with independently checked coverage
reuse learned clauses only under an identical variable map
stream and hash compressed proof artifacts
expected_throughput_gain: at least the exact 10395-fold matching quotient before solver-dependent gains; root and cube gains must be measured
soundness_basis: double-counted point and pair incidences plus the action of S12; full derivation is in docs/BASELINE.md
uncompressed_remainder: the two canonical root cases and all leaves of their independently checked cube frontier
yellow_gate: 20-80% sampled cubes close or projection is 250-1000 core-hours; permit one bounded redesign tranche
red_gate: semantic disagreement, orbit/proof-replay failure, projection above 1000 core-hours after redesign, or proof growth above 30 GB
resource_gate: do not compete with the active R(5,5) census or residual SAT on the droplet

link_orbit_redesign.naive_cost: choose 20 of 462 point-link blocks, approximately 5.315e34 subsets
link_orbit_redesign.symmetry_reduction: fix the degree-10 point and its matched partner, leaving the exact C2 wr S5 action of order 3840; canonicalize and block complete link orbits
link_orbit_redesign.incremental_constraints: retain the same 165 triple-cover and 11 exact-degree constraints while appending only independently rebuilt primary-variable orbit blockers
link_orbit_redesign.soundness_basis: the no-fixed-block exact-degree link formulation is independently audited at the OPB level; every SAT witness is checked directly, and UNSAT remains provisional until the exact CNF has a replayed proof plus a source-to-CNF audit
link_orbit_redesign.checkpoint_unit: one newly canonicalized link orbit and its full hash-bound blocking clause set
link_orbit_redesign.next_gate: run one bounded second-orbit discriminator; SAT permits a checkpointed orbit-enumeration tranche, UNKNOWN redirects encoding, and UNSAT requires proof replay and an independent CNF semantic audit before an exhaustiveness claim
link_orbit_redesign.uncompressed_remainder: all feasible exact-degree links outside the single 320-member orbit already blocked

decision_value: either settle an exact classical covering number or produce reusable proof-producing covering-design infrastructure
